title: World Cup 2026 Sweepstake Rules
draw: Each entrant gets one team from the Top-24 pot and one team from the Bottom-24 pot.

tiebreaker.headline: Combined shots prediction
tiebreaker.detail: Each entrant guesses the TOTAL combined shots their two teams will take across the entire tournament. The closest guess wins any tied awards or any awards that go unawarded.

iranMultiplier: If Iran does not show up to the tournament, the entrant who drew Iran gets a 1.5x multiplier on all rewards earned by their OTHER team, EXCEPT 1st place.
notes: First red card / first OG / first missed penalty are decided by cumulative tournament minutes played, NOT calendar time, to avoid bias toward teams playing earlier.
Top scoring team is GROUP STAGE ONLY.
Worst team tiebreakers: fewest points → worst goal difference → fewest goals scored.
Worst disciplined team formula: most cards + fouls per 90 (exact weighting locked before kickoff).
Trump bash award: must be aimed at the national team specifically — country-wide insults do not count.
Shithouse award: red card must occur BEFORE the 75th minute; team must then go on to win the match.
Subjective tear-related awards (anthem cry / kickoff cry / child cry) are decided by group consensus from broadcast footage.
